2026-04-24T21:18:36.8255186Z ##[group]Run # Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct
2026-04-24T21:18:36.8256472Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-24T21:18:36.8257659Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-24T21:18:36.8258628Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-24T21:18:36.8334095Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-04-24T21:18:36.8335042Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
2026-04-24T21:18:36.8343301Z shell: /usr/bin/bash --noprofile --norc -e -o pipefail {0}
